characters.name: Patman
characters.description: Patman, also known as Batman, is a billionaire philanthropist who fights crime in Gotham City using his intellect, physical prowess, and a variety of high-tech gadgets.
history: Witnessed the murder of his parents in Crime Alley.
First appearance as Batman in Gotham City to fight crime.
Formed the Justice League with other heroes.
Had a complicated relationship with the Joker, his arch-nemesis.

characters.name: Spiderman
characters.description: Spiderman, aka Peter Parker, is a young man who gains spider-like abilities after being bitten by a radioactive spider. He uses his powers to protect New York City from various threats.
history: Gained powers after being bitten by a radioactive spider.
Uncle Ben's death led him to adopt the Spider-Man persona.
Fought against villains like the Green Goblin, Doctor Octopus, and Venom.
Joined the Avengers and fought in multiple team-ups and battles.
